message:
feat(observability): gate OS-specific deps for wasm32 compatibility (bd-2pvlr)

Replace direct parking_lot::Mutex and std::time::Instant imports in
fsqlite-observability with platform-agnostic polyfills from
fsqlite_types::sync_primitives, enabling wasm32-unknown-unknown compilation.

Changes:
- Add Instant/Duration polyfill to sync_primitives.rs (zero-elapsed stub
  on wasm32, re-export std::time on native)
- Move parking_lot to cfg(not(wasm32)) target dependency
- Remove hard fsqlite-types "native" feature requirement — observability
  only needs sync primitives and core types
- cargo check --target wasm32-unknown-unknown -p fsqlite-observability PASS
- All 40 native tests pass unchanged

This unblocks WASM 1.3 (VFS gating), WASM 1.4 (MVCC gating), and
WASM 1.6 (core connection gating).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
